Alberto Monge Roffarello
  • End-User Development
    EUD Intro Definition Discovery Debugging
  • Digital Wellbeing
    DWB Intro Digital Self-Control Tools Multi-device DWB Design for DWB
  • Publications
  • CV
  • Teaching

I am an Assistant Professor (RTDa) at the Department of Control and Computer Engineering, Politecnico di Torino, with the e-Lite Research Group. My current research targets the end user personalization of smart devices, online services, and user's behaviors with these technologies. On the one hand, I focus on end-user personalization of Internet of Things ecosystems. On the other hand, I explore how to support users to achieve what Google called the Digital Wellbeing.

Highlights

  • Jan 20, 2021
    New CHI 2021 paper: "Coping with Digital Wellbeing in a Multi-Device World"
  • Jan 12, 2021
    New TOIS paper: "From Users' Intentions to IF-THEN Rules in the Internet of Things"
  • May 22, 2020
    PhD Defense
  • May 9, 2019
    New CHI 2019 paper: "Empowering End Users in Debugging Trigger-Action Rules"
  • May 6, 2019
    New CHI 2019 paper: "The Race Towards Digital Wellbeing: Issues and Opportunities"
